{{Fig|Exemplary 3-D graph of [[Glossary:Forgetting_curve|forgetting curves]] for [[Glossary:A-Factor|A-Factor]]{{=}}3.6. Axes: X - [[Glossary:Repetition_category|repetition category]], Y - recall in percent ([[Glossary:Retention|knowledge retention]]), Z (the incoming axis) - time (expressed by [[Glossary:U-Factor|U-Factor]]). The graph has been smoothed along the Y-axis (by averaging results corresponding to different [[Glossary:Repetition_category|repetition categories]]), and rotated once for better visibility (the slope illustrates forgetting in time that is roughly similar for various [[Glossary:Repetition_category|repetition categories]] except those with high repetition number that may reflect scarcity of data for long [[Glossary:Interval|intervals]]). For a better view of the same data in 3D see: '''[[Toolkit menu|Toolkit]] : [[Toolkit menu#Memory|Memory]] : [[Memory graphs (4D)|4D graphs]] : Forgetting'''.}}
